---
title: Battle Hymn of the Tiger Mother
author: Amy Chua
date: '2025-10-31'
categories:
- Family & Relationships
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★★★
rating: 4
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# Battle Hymn of the Tiger Mother
Nice read into the life of asian families in america and i think it is quite relatable, although it mainly pertains to music and the pursuit of it. I thought it would contain more about the lives of her children compared to just music but overall still nice

## Reading Journey

- 2025-10-31: Finished
